title: Developing Better Policies in the Indian Coal Sector
summary: Chikkatur and Sagar discuss the role of coal in India's energy supply, key challenges related to the growth of India's coal sector, and special institutional and governance issues. They conclude by highlighting key areas for policy focus.
body: Presented at the Conference on Managing the Social and Environmental Consequences of Coal Mining in India, New Delhi The latest from Belfer See more Chikkatur and Sagar discuss the role of coal in India's energy supply, key challenges related to the growth of India's coal sector, and special institutional and governance issues. They conclude by highlighting key areas for policy focus. See also the associated conference paper, " Developing Better Policies for the Sustainable Development of the Indian Coal Sector ."
